{% if audience == "internal" %}
## NYT::NFlow::TUnitedParameters&lt;NYT::NFlow::TMoniumSource&gt; {#NYT_NFlow_TUnitedParameters_NYT_NFlow_TMoniumSource}
<!-- This file is generated by yt/yt/flow/tools/generate_yson_struct_doc/generate.sh script -->
<!-- Before using doc generation tool check readme: yt/yt/flow/tools/generate_yson_struct_doc/README.md -->
Source: [yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/common/registry-inl.h]({{source-root}}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/common/registry-inl.h)

#|
|| **Parameter** | **Description** ||
|| `finite` | **Type**: `bool`
**Default value**: `false`
Treat the source as finite: remember the number of messages in it on startup and transition the stream to the completed state after all those messages are read. ||
|| `driver_resource_id` | **Type**: `NYT::NFlow::TStrongIdentifierTypedef<NYT::NFlow::TResourceIdTag>`
**Default value**: `MoniumDriver`
Resource ID of `TMoniumDriver` in the pipeline spec. Default is `MoniumDriver`. ||
|| `project_id` | **Type**: `std::string`
**Required parameter**
Monium project from which the metrics are read. ||
|| `cluster` | **Type**: `std::optional<std::string>`
Cluster (typically substituted in the selector; not used directly by the driver). ||
|| `service` | **Type**: `std::optional<std::string>`
Service. ||
|| `queries` | **Type**: `std::vector<NYT::TIntrusivePtr<`[NYT::NFlow::TMoniumQuerySpec](./all_yson_structs#NYT_NFlow_TMoniumQuerySpec)`>>`
**Required parameter**
List of queries: each element is a pair of `name` (name for identification in the response) and `selector` (metric selector). ||
|| `poll_interval` | **Type**: [TDuration](./all_yson_structs#TDuration)
**Default value**: `1m`
Poller period and simultaneously the width of one polling window. Each time, the poller queries Monium for the half-open interval `[LastPolledTo, min(now, LastPolledTo + poll_interval))`. After a successful response, `LastPolledTo` shifts exactly to the upper bound — windows join without duplicates or gaps. On pipeline restart, `LastPolledTo` is restored from `GetPersistedEventWatermark()`, so a downtime of arbitrary length does not result in data loss — the source catches up within `⌈downtime / poll_interval⌉` polling cycles. ||
|| `lookback` | **Type**: [TDuration](./all_yson_structs#TDuration)
**Default value**: `0`
Depth of history that the poller requests on a cold start when the persisted watermark is not yet available. On a cold start, `LastPolledTo` is initialized as `now - lookback`. Default is `0` — the start begins with fresh data, no history catch-up. After the first committed heartbeat, the parameter is no longer used: the position is restored from `PersistedEventWatermark`. ||
|| `read_timeout` | **Type**: [TDuration](./all_yson_structs#TDuration)
**Default value**: `30s`
Timeout for a single `DataService.Read` call. ||
|| `emit_per_point` | **Type**: `bool`
**Default value**: `true`
If `true` (default), a separate message is generated for each time series point, and the `timestamp`/`value` columns have specific types (`Uint64`/`Double`). If `false`, a single time series is emitted as one message with packed arrays of timestamps and values in `Any`. ||
|| `output_name_column` | **Type**: `std::string`
**Default value**: `name`
Column name in the output stream for the sensor name. Default is `name`. ||
|| `output_query_name_column` | **Type**: `std::string`
**Default value**: `query_name`
Column name for the query name (`Query.name` from the spec). Default is `query_name`. ||
|| `output_labels_column` | **Type**: `std::string`
**Default value**: `labels`
Column name for labels. Default is `labels`. ||
|| `output_timestamp_column` | **Type**: `std::string`
**Default value**: `timestamp`
Column name for the timestamp. Default is `timestamp`. ||
|| `output_type_column` | **Type**: `std::string`
**Default value**: `type`
Column name for the metric type (string `DGAUGE`, `IGAUGE`, `COUNTER`, `RATE`). Default is `type`. ||
|| `output_value_column` | **Type**: `std::string`
**Default value**: `value`
Column name for the metric value. Default is `value`. ||
|| `mismatch_behavior` | **Type**: [NYT::NFlow::EMoniumMismatchBehavior](./all_yson_structs#NYT_NFlow_EMoniumMismatchBehavior)
**Default value**: `truncate_and_log`
 ||
|| `max_pending_records` | **Type**: `long`
**Default value**: `100000`
 ||
|#


{% cut "**Additional parameters**" %}


#|
|| `update_info_period` | **Type**: [TDuration](./all_yson_structs#TDuration)
**Default value**: `15s`
 ||
|| `byte_size_alpha` | **Type**: `double`
**Default value**: `0.05`
 ||
